confirmed.claim: Storage upload returns undefined 'data' object, causing TypeError when accessing data.path

poc.request: POST /api/submit-surat with { record: { attachments: [{ name: 'test.pdf', data_url: 'data:application/pdf;base64,...' }] } }
poc.expected: Attachment uploaded to storage, storage_path returned
poc.actual: TypeError: Cannot read property 'path' of undefined → 500 error → submission fails

confirmed.claim: Rate limit increment failure is silently swallowed — allows unlimited submissions after DB error
BigInt conversion loses precision for amounts > Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER
Missing role check on GET /api/wilayah — verifyAdmin allows all admin roles to read wilayah data
Audit log insert failure is silently ignored — no record of admin actions if DB fails
Production server starts with wildcard CORS when ALLOWED_ORIGIN is empty string — allows any origin to make authenticated requests

poc.actual: Request succeeds — wildcard CORS allows any origin

confirmed.claim: initUsersStore() sync failure silently falls back to empty cache — users cannot login after sync error

dismissed.reason: Rate limit is IP-based (5 per minute). No practical enumeration path without many IPs.

dismissed.claim: Warga ownership check uses loose string comparison
dismissed.reason: NIK stored as string in DB (character varying). No type coercion issue.

dismissed.claim: Phone number normalization logic has edge case
dismissed.reason: Fonnte API validates format server-side. Errors are logged and returned. Intentional resilience design.

dismissed.claim: Public GET /api/inventaris exposes internal asset data
dismissed.reason: Documented design: 'public for read'. Asset inventory is public per Indonesian village transparency requirements.
Vite's import.meta.env.DEV is false in production builds. Security boundary enforced by build system.

dismissed.claim: Unsigned sessions allowed in dev mode
dismissed.reason: Intentional for developer testing. Production enforces signed sessions. Server-side verification is the security boundary.
Requires both VITE_DEV_OTP_BYPASS and hostname check. Vite's DEV flag prevents production exploitation.

dismissed.claim: OTP rate limit stored in sessionStorage
dismissed.reason: Client-side rate limit is UX only. Server-side RPC enforces authoritative rate limit (3 per NIK per 15 min).
